name: csu

metadata.name: csu
metadata.summary: Clean Slate Utils - bunch of utility code, mostly Django/DRF specific.

documentation:
# Overview

Clean Slate Utils - bunch of utility code, mostly Django/DRF specific.

- Free software: BSD 2-Clause License

## Installation

```
pip install csu
```

You can also install the in-development version with:

```
pip install https://github.com/ionelmc/python-csu/archive/main.zip
```

## Documentation

None.

## Development

To run all the tests run:

```
tox
```

Note, to combine the coverage data from all the tox environments run:

```
.. list-table::
    :widths: 10 90
    :stub-columns: 1

    - - Windows
      - ::

            set PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--cov-append
            tox

    - - Other
      - ::

            PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--cov-append tox

```

## Changelog

### 0.0.0 (2024-03-24)

- First release on PyPI.

classes.name: csu.routers.APIRootView
documentation: Service list.

functions.name: csu.timezones.adjust_dt
documentation:
Args:
    dt: datetime to convert
    assumed_tz: assumed timezone if naive
    tz: target timezone

Returns: timezone-aware datetime

functions.name: csu.xml.serialize_xml
documentation: Patched up version of etree.ElementTree._serialize_xml that produces well-indented output.

methods.name: csu.drf.views.AsyncAPIView.initial
documentation: Runs anything that needs to occur prior to calling the method handler.

classes.name: csu.drf.auth.AnyAuthentication
documentation: Allows access only to authenticated users.

classes.name: csu.drf.auth.BearerTokenAuthentication
documentation:
Simple token based authentication.

Clients should authenticate by passing the token key in the "Authorization"
HTTP header, prepended with the string "Token ".  For example:

    Authorization: Bearer 401f7ac837da42b97f613d789819ff93537bee6a

classes.name: csu.exceptions.RetryableError
documentation: Either the service is down or temporarily broken (eg: 404/5xx states, malformed responses etc). Retryable.

classes.name: csu.exceptions.DecodingError
documentation: When content decoding fails.

classes.name: csu.exceptions.InternalServiceError
documentation: The service failed in handling (expected fields are missing, buggy code etc). Not retryable.

classes.name: csu.exceptions.UnexpectedStatusError
documentation: When response status is bad.

classes.name: csu.exceptions.ExhaustedRetriesError
documentation: The service reached the retry limit. Obviously not retryable.

classes.name: csu.exceptions.OpenServiceError
documentation: The service failed in handling in a way that should be propagated upward the public API.

modules.name: csu
documentation: a.k.a Clean Slate Utils

functions.name: csu.views.exception_handler
documentation:
Returns the response that should be used for any given exception.

By default, we handle the REST framework `APIException`, and also
Django's built-in `Http404` and `PermissionDenied` exceptions.

Any unhandled exceptions may return `None`, which will cause a 500 error
to be raised.

functions.name: csu.views.server_error
documentation: Generic 500 error handler.

classes.name: csu.views.LoggingMixin
documentation: A mixin class providing logic to log API requests.

methods.name: csu.admin.SmartField.clean
documentation:
Perform exception wrapping early here (instead of letting import_obj do it).
Apparently that behavior is completely missing from (for import_id_fields).

functions.name: csu.wsgi.buffer_input
documentation: Required for LoggingMixin to be able to log raw input (useful for debugging decoding failures).

modules.name: csu.test_timezones
documentation: ruff: noqa: DTZ001

documentation: Called before a unit of work is performed.

methods.name: csu.worker.engine.AbstractWorker.after

Called before after a unit of work is performed.
\:param idle: True if run would have a spin-loop condition.

methods.name: csu.worker.engine.AbstractProducer.fetch_task
documentation: Should raise error if there would be a spin-loop condition.
